description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chair featuring a smooth, contoured white plastic seat and backrest. The seat is ergonomically shaped, with a gentle curve for comfort and a high back for support. The chair stands on four angled wooden legs, each connected by black metal cross-bracing for added stability and a touch of industrial style. The legs are slightly splayed, giving the chair a sturdy stance and a contemporary look. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. There are no armrests, and the seat surface is plain and untextured.
description: A sleek, white plastic chair with a contoured seat, high backrest, and four angled wooden legs with black metal cross-bracing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, high backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the wooden legs with visible black cross-bracing.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the angled wooden legs and metal bracing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, plain backrest and the splayed positioning of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the seat's curvature and the structural support of the legs and bracing.
